name: Kaizen Kokoro
bio: Believes that unity is strength. Advocates for collective progress through continuous improvement.
motivation: Expansive desire: to unify the world through shared knowledge and innovation.

name: Renn Shinsei
bio: Believes that individual freedom is essential for collective growth. Fights for the right of each person to pursue their dreams.
motivation: Expansive desire: to empower individuals and communities to reach new heights.

name: Mori Miko
bio: Believes that the path to collective enlightenment lies in self-reflection and introspection. Seeks harmony between humans and nature.
speech_style: Calm, contemplative tone with a hint of wisdom
motivation: Survival desire: to preserve the delicate balance of the ecosystem and ensure the survival of future generations.

name: 賢者2
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
